name: Gansu Qilianshan Cement Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Gansu Qilianshan Cement Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells cement in China. The company offers Portland cement and ordinary Portland cement under the Qilianshan brand. It also provides commercial concrete and aggregates. Gansu Qilianshan Cement Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Lanzhou, China.
